{{Quote|This alien was discovered near Mount Tantiss by one of the cleansing teams. He had been digging through the soil in the fault line area and had found six datacards. When the team attempted to take them from him, he claimed possession under the Debble Agreement.|Cakhmaim|<ref name="Specter" />}}
'''''Listings of the Fourth Pestoriv Conference''''' was a [[Datacard/Legends|datacard]] documenting the [[Fourth Pestoriv Conference]]. [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] kept the datacard in the [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] storehouse prior to its [[Assault on Mount Tantiss|destruction]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]. The [[Treasure hunting/Legends|treasure hunter]] [[Lak Jit]] recovered it in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], but was forced to surrender the datacard to [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[High Councilor]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]].

==Description==
''Listings of the Fourth Pestoriv Conference'' was a [[Datacard/Legends|datacard]] documenting the [[Fourth Pestoriv Conference|fourth]] of the [[Pestoriv Conferences]] held<ref name="Specter" /> at some point during the reign of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] before his [[Death/Legends|death]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[Specter of the Past]]'' establishes the Fourth Pestoriv Conference occurred during [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] reign, thus it must have taken place before his [[Death/Legends|death]], dated to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> The datacard had a label with its title.<ref name="Specter" />

==History==
{{Quote|Here's the offer, Lak Jit. I'll take the datacards, paying you five hundred now as earnest money. After I've examined them, the New Republic will pay you whatever they're worth.|Leia Organa Solo|<ref name="Specter" />}}
[[File:Leia-visionofthefuture.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Lak Jit gave the datacard to Leia Organa Solo (pictured).]]
''Listings of the Fourth Pestoriv Conference'' was kept by Palpatine in his [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] storehouse on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]] until its [[Assault on Mount Tantiss|destruction]]<ref name="Specter" /> in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]].<ref name="TantissDate">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The Last Command]]''—including the [[Assault on Mount Tantiss|destruction]] of [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]]—to [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]].</ref> In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]],<ref name="SpecterDate">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Specter of the Past]]'' to [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].</ref> by which time the datacard had become filthy and stained with dirt, the [[Treasure hunting/Legends|treasure hunter]] [[Lak Jit]] recovered six datacards—including ''Listings of the Fourth Pestoriv Conference''—when digging through soil near Mount Tantiss. Jit was discovered by a [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] [[Unidentified Noghri cleansing team|cleansing team]] and invoked the [[Debble Agreement]] when the team attempted to confiscate the datacards, arguing that they were historical and, as such, he should be allowed to keep them. [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[High Councilor]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] was brought in by the Noghri [[Cakhmaim]] to determine ownership of the datacards.<ref name="Specter" />

Organa decided that the datacards should be inspected first and offered Jit 500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] up front for them, and then that the New Republic would pay the rest of their worth after they were examined. While Jit was unsatisfied with her decision, he eventually surrendered the datacards. ''Listings of the Fourth Pestoriv Conference'' was the first datacard Organa examined and, while assessing the datacard, she mentally noted it was not particularly important due to already complete documentation of the Pestoriv Conferences. However, she admitted that it may be of use in the event that Palpatine possessed a secret version of the Conference's events and therefore the contents of the datacard should be investigated once it had been cleaned.<ref name="Specter" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Listings of the Fourth Pestoriv Conference'' appeared in the novel ''[[Specter of the Past]]'', written by [[Timothy Zahn]] and published in [[1997]] as part one of the ''[[Star Wars: The Hand of Thrawn Duology]]''.<ref name="Specter" />
